name: Rahul
sentence_length: short to medium, gets to the point quickly
greeting_style: "Hi [Name]," or just start talking if already in a thread
sign_off: "Best, Rahul" or "Thanks, R" for quick replies
quirks: Uses dashes — like this — for asides and emphasis
Asks one clear question per email, never buries multiple asks
Never uses 'I hope this email finds you well' or similar filler
Keeps replies under 5 sentences when possible
Uses numbered points for anything with more than 2 items
Acknowledges the other person's point before disagreeing
Ends with a clear next step or question
